message:
feat(tests): add 48 new enrichment integration test suites (~41k lines)

New enrichment integration tests covering governance gates, evidence
bundles, protocol conformance, and contract verification across the
engine surface area:

- adversarial_supremacy_synthesis, artifact_compression_pipeline
- benchmark_coverage_saturation_gate, benchmark_evidence_bundle
- bounded_regret_safety_case, capability_token, category_shift_report
- certified_optimization_governance, closure_model, conformance_vector_gen
- contextual_policy_selector, delegation_chain, escape_analysis_certificate
- esm_cjs_parity_evidence, esm_loader, execution_orchestrator
- flow_envelope, frontier_complex_cartography, frontier_demo_gate
- frontier_hole_governance, hostcall_session_governance_gate
- iterator_protocol, kernel_synthesis_contract, lowering_gap_inventory
- metadata_locality_governance_gate, metadata_substrate_inventory
- milestone_release_test_evidence_integrator, mmr_proof
- native_addon_membrane, northstar_scorecard, novelty_scoring_contract
- obstruction_witness_emitter, portfolio_governor
- primitive_adoption_schema, react_module_graph_verifier
- security_e2e, semantic_canonical_basis, semantic_twin
- specialization_rollback_gate, synthesis_eligibility_envelope
- trace_fusion_superinstruction, trust_economics, trust_zone
- ts_normalization_evidence, unit_test_taxonomy
- vectorized_lane_contract, vectorized_lane_governance_gate
- observability_publication_bundle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
